svg.title: HFT Stage 1 Architecture — NIC to Market Data Handler
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the kernel bypass path from NIC hardware through DPDK poll-mode driver, SPSC queue, to the market data parser, contrasted with the conventional Linux kernel path that is bypassed.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of NIC hardware is used in HFT systems?')
sendPrompt('How does a poll-mode driver PMD thread work in DPDK?')
sendPrompt('What is an SPSC queue and why is it used in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What does a market data parsing thread do in an HFT system?')
g.text: Emits structured order book events → Stage 2
